commands.review_summary:
The PR restores a plugin-owned 48-model OpenCode Zen fallback and live catalog, dynamic model resolution, family-specific transport normalization, manifest metadata, and focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source +1617, Tests +350. Total +1967 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level with high confidence: current main and v2026.6.6 expose OpenCode Zen authentication but omit the previously shipped catalog and dynamic-resolution path. This read-only review did not execute a credentialed failing request.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The code-level routing defect is resolved; maintainers should now require contributor-supplied credentialed provider proof and decide whether to own the full durable fallback catalog before merge.
